zh.lifeSummary: Alicia Basset於1179年出生在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾利林斯同 代雷爾。她於1199年與Roger De Samford在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾利林斯同 代雷爾結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Basset
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from a diminutive of Old French bas(se) ‘short, of low stature’ (see Bas ).
English: variant of   Bassett  , a cognate of 1 above.
In some cases also an altered form of French Besset (see Bessette 2). Compare Bassette 1.

variants.name: Bas
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Mauricio, Abelardo, Florencio, Francisco, Jorge, Luis, Manuel, Pedro, Soledad, Vicente.  Eastern Slavic Dmytro, Liya, Pyotr, Sergey.
Catalan: habitational name from a place so named in the district of La Garrotxa, Catalonia.
Basque: topographic name for someone who lived by a wood, from baso ‘wood, forest’.

nameMeanings.name: Alicia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

variants.name: Alisha
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

en.lifeSummary: Alicia Basset was born in 1179, in Lillingstone Dayrell, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. She married Roger De Samford in 1199, in Lillingstone Dayrell, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter.

ko.lifeSummary: Alicia Basset(은)는 1179년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 릴링스톤 데이렐에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1199년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 릴링스톤 데이렐에서 Roger De Samford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.
